'''Illicit Electronics''' was a corporation that produced a wide range of electronics, including several products that were employed in illegal activities such as [[Computer/Legends|computer]] [[Slicer/Legends|slicing]]. Production of these devices caused the company to come under severe scrutiny by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Because of this Illicit Electronics was forced to go underground, employing a wide variety of underworld contacts in order to continue putting their products on the market. As such, Illicit Electronics became a thriving underworld business.
